articles.title: Polygon Links With Filecoin, How Users Will Benefit From Free Storage
articles.description: Layer one network Polygon continues to expand and solidified its position in the crypto space. Recently, they announced a new partnership with Filecoin, a network that allows users to store and transfer data via a native marketplace. The cooperation launched the Filecoin-Polygon Bridge, to increase their interoperability. Built by the Textile team, the bridge enables users to use any Polygon mainnet to connect with Filecoin’s storage and (…) start storing data on Filecoin from any Polygon addres

articles.title: Just 3 dormant addresses are behind 6% of Dogecoin (DOGE) market cap
articles.description: More than 8% of Dogecoin (DOGE) in current circulation rests in the top ten dormant addresses, BitInfoCharts’ data shows.

articles.title: Legal Expert: Treasury Department Plans To “Capture DeFi”
articles.description: The emergency cryptocurrency provisions in the United States infrastructure bill target DeFi says Jake Chervinsky. During a podcast on Bankless State of the Network, the general counsel for Compound and DeFi’s Chairman of the Blockchain Association declares that infrastructure bills have “blindsided” the industry through cryptocurrency tax provisions. articles.title: Number of Lost Bitcoins Hits 33.96% Of Total BTC Supply, Here’s What It Means
articles.description: Data provided by Glassnode shows that the number of long-term held or lost Bitcoins has reached a new major high of almost 34 percent of the BTC supply
